titleStmt.title: SII 37.243: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 243. (A.R. No. B 349 of 1940-41.) Garisalūru, Jammalamaḍugu Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab lying near the ruined temple of Śiva.
This is dated Śaka 1453, Khara, Chaitra śu. 15, corresponding to 1531 A.D., April 5, Saturday.

It registers a gift of land by Narasabhūpāla, son of Tirumalarāja and Tirumaladēvī and grandson of Kaṇṭamarāju Rimmarāja to for the benefit of the god Chennakēśava, on the bank of the Kumudvati in the Chāmgalamaṟi-sīma of Mulikināḍu in the Udayagiri-rājya. The donor bears a number of epithets such as Bejavāḍapuravarādhīśvara, Mādhavavarmakula-Pradīpa, Bejavāḍa-pāla-pratishṭhāpanāchārya etc. He belonged to the solar race and Vaśishṭha gōtra and is said to be a subordinate of the king. It also records a provision made to the pipers etc., for service in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī ja
yābhyudaya śālivāhana
śakavarṣaṁbyulu 1453 Agunē
ṁṭi khara saṁvatsara caitra śu 15 lu .
śrīmaṁnmahārājādhirāja rājapa
ramēśvara Aṣṭadikkurāya manōbhaya
ṁkara mūrurāyaragaṁḍa śrī vijayanagara
paṭṭaṇādhīśvara yīśvaranāyaka pautra nara
sānāyaka putra Acyutarāya mahārāya kṛpā
kaṭākṣa labdhaiśvaryyadhuryyasūryyavaṁśōdbhava
vaśiṣṭhagōtra pavitra bejavāḍapuravarādhīśvara malli
khārjunadēvadivyaśrīpādapadmārādhaka mādhavavarmma kulapradī
pa bejavāḍa pālapratiṣṭāpanācāryya sētusitādrihya
ṁta biruda . nistaṁbha hōsa cirudaragaṁḍa . raṇa
raṁgabhairava . maṁnnebhārgavakaṁṭhama
rāju tiṁmmarājupautra ti
rumalarājaputra tirumaladēvigarbha
sudhābdicaṁdrā . varnāśrama dharmapratipāla
kadēva brāhmaṇa pūjā parāyaṇa śrī
narasabhūpāla cūḍāmaṇi hariharā
dulakuṁjēśina kaiṁkaryyamu vudayagiri
rājyaṁlōni mulikināṁṭi bhūmilōni śrī
vēdādri garuḍādri madhyanu bhavanāśi
nītīra divyamaṁṭṭapa nivāsuṁḍaina śrī
Ahōbalēśvarunki yōjaparyaṁ
tamaina nairuti digbhāgāna mā nāyaṁ
karānkuṁ jellē cēṁgalamaṟi śrī

kumudvatida
mēśvara caṁnnakē
rājuṁgārki pu
sthāIgānu su
ṭapāluṁ gaṭṭiṁci
paḷakuṁjellē cē
nakēśvarunikiṁnni
mukrottagānu
samarpiṁ
yiddumukunnu
kōnēru cēśē rega
staḷa 3 nnu yidula basvana śiṁ
gulabayalu 2 nnu 3 sakaḷaṁ
basavayya cauṭa cēnu 2 nnu 2
veraśi staḷālu 3 nnu cēnu
khaṁ . 2 nnu dēvaḷaku ḍō
ḷu nāgasarālavūḍi
gaṁ cēśēyaṁduku maṁ
ggaḷa kasavōju koḍku
mōjuku sāgiṁstimi
vāṁḍu dēvaḷla vūḍigaṁ śēsukoni
putrapautrapāraṁparyyamuṁgā
nu ĀcaṁdrārkkasthāIgānu A
nubhaviṁcēdi . svadattā dviguṇaṁ
puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ para
dattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavē
t . śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 37.243 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
